title: Mean flow in round bubble plumes
extraction_scope: Selected dimensional tabular data from Tables 1-4

selected_variables.b_smooth_m: smoothed plume half-width/plume radius at measurement height, m
selected_variables.U_smooth_m_s: smoothed centerline velocity at measurement height, m/s
selected_variables.b_midpoint_m: midpoint average plume half-width/plume radius, m
selected_variables.W: height-interval weighting term used in Milgram equation (2.25)

notes: Tables 1 and 3 contain measurement-height values and gamma.
Tables 2 and 4 contain midpoint values and alpha/W.
Blank gamma, alpha, or W cells indicate the value is not reported for that row/table.
The combined file uses b_m and U_m_s with value_basis to identify whether the values are smoothed measurement-height values or midpoint averages.

source_tables.description: Primary measurement-height data with smooth b/U, q, and gamma.
Primary midpoint data with b/U/q averages, W, and alpha.
Secondary Kobus/Topham measurement-height data with smooth b/U, q, and gamma.
Secondary Kobus/Topham midpoint data with b/U/q averages, W, and alpha.
Combined selected Milgram 1983 tabular data with common b_m and U_m_s columns.
